name: Crab Cakes, Tuna Cakes
recipeIngredient: 6 to 7 ounces crab meat or water-packed tuna (drained)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Spray nonstick baking sheet with vegetable cooking spray.
3. In a large bowl, gently mix all ingredients, being careful not to break up lumps of crab meat. Using about 1/4 cup of the mixture for each cake, shape into circles and press flat.
4. Place shaped cakes on prepared baking sheet.
5. Bake 20 to 25 minutes or until golden brown.
6. Yield: 2 servings (3 cakes each)
Calories: 53.30
Protein: 52%
Fat: 25%
Carbohydrate: 23%
Sod-Mg: 183.0
Exchanges: Veg 0.1, Meat 0.8, Fat 0.1
